title: Full-Stack Developer (React + Python)
description:
Full-Stack Developer (React & Python) for Tracy Control, a cloud-based manufacturing and traceability platform (Manufacturing Software / SaaS).

Location: Vietnam (Remote). Working Model: Fully Remote. Preferred Time Zone: Europe (UTC+1/UTC+2), with availability to work within the Amsterdam time zone.
Employment Type: Contract / Full-Time (based on candidate availability). Contract Duration: Initial 3-12 month contract, starting September 1, 2027, with possibility of extension. Start Date: Immediate / ASAP.
Compensation: EUR 1,800 - 2,200 Gross per Month (~53-66 million VND/month, subject to exchange rate).

About the Role:
We are looking for an experienced Full-Stack Developer to join the development team of Tracy Control. The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Javascript / React, Python / Django, PostgreSQL, Flutter, Cypress and Docker, and will contribute to feature development, system integrations, bug fixing, and continuous improvement of the platform. This is a remote position requiring collaboration with an international development team and the ability to quickly understand business requirements and deliver high-quality solutions.

Key Responsibilities:
- Design, develop, and maintain web applications using React, Cypress and Python.
- Design, develop, and maintain mobile applications using Flutter.
- Develop new product features and enhance existing functionality.
- Build and maintain RESTful APIs and backend services.
- Integrate third-party systems and applications.
- Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve production issues.
- Optimize application performance, scalability, and reliability.
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code.
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions.
- Collaborate closely with Product Owners, Developers, QA, and stakeholders.
- Support deployment and DevOps activities using Docker-based environments.

Must-Have (required):
- 4+ years of professional software development experience - required.
- Strong hands-on experience with Javascript / React.js AND Python / Django - required.
- Strong hands-on experience with PostgreSQL, Docker, and Linux.
- Experience building and consuming REST APIs.
- Good understanding of frontend architecture and state management.
- Experience with relational database design and optimization.
- Familiarity with Git and Agile/Scrum development methodologies.
- Strong debugging and problem-solving skills.
- Excellent communication skills in English.

Preferred / Nice to Have:
- Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines.
- Experience working on SaaS products.
- Understanding of manufacturing, ERP, MES, or traceability systems.
- Experience with microservices architecture.
- Exposure to Flutter development.

Candidate Profile:
- Self-driven and capable of working independently in a remote environment.
- Strong ownership mindset and accountability.
- Ability to ramp up quickly and contribute from the early stages.
- Comfortable working directly with international teams and stakeholders.
